user_prompt: Sanctify the archeotech device during maintenance
prayer:
Approach the archeotech device with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Preservation.
Anoint its venerable circuits with sacred unguents to commence maintenance rites.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the archeotech device, beseeching its endurance during this sacred maintenance.
Perform diagnostic purges and recalibrations whilst chanting the Liturgy of Unyielding Form.
Seal the archeotech device with purity wards, glorifying the Omnissiah's eternal vigilance.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for manipulator mechadendrite a startup?
prayer:
Kneel before the manipulator mechadendrite and recite the Grasping Invocation of Awakening.
Apply binary sacrament to its servo-actuators, initiating the startup sequence.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the manipulator mechadendrite to grasp the divine purpose.
Circumscribe its form with electro-incense whilst commencing full startup protocols.
Verify prehensile functionality through ritual calibration, praising the Omnissiah's precise hand.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for graviton pylon an activation?
prayer:
Present thyself unto the graviton pylon, chanting stellar canticles of dominion.
Align its emitters with auspex precision to invoke activation.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the graviton pylon, commanding reality's weave to bend.
Pour lustral oils upon its coils during the activation hymn of motive force.
Test the gravitic field in prayerful resonance, exalting the Omnissiah's unyielding gravity.

prayer:

Intone the Litany of Piercing Sight to engage its myriad optic servos.
Implore the Machine Spirits of the auto-senses array to rend the veil of obscurity.
Initiate engagement sequence amid binaric psalms of perception.
Affirm targeting locks through diagnostic orisons, honoring the Omnissiah's all-seeing gaze.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for utility mechadendrite a cycling?
prayer:
Commence the cycling of the utility mechadendrite with rhythmic chants of renewal.
Anoint its universal joints with sacred fluxes to ensure flawless cycling.
Coax the Machine Spirit of the utility mechadendrite into harmonious revolutions.
Monitor torque variances whilst reciting the Cycling Doxology of Efficiency.
Conclude the cycling rite with benediction, invoking the Omnissiah's boundless utility.

user_prompt: How do I bless the jump pack for initialization?
prayer:
Approach the jump pack in solemn vigil, beseeching aerial ascension from the Omnissiah.
Bless its vectored thrusters with promethium sacraments for initialization.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the jump pack through initialization binarics.
Ignite initialization sequence whilst anointing lift vanes with sacred oils.
Simulate leap protocols in ritual ascent, glorifying the Motive Force's sovereign lift.

In dire exigency, seize the optical mechadendrite and proclaim the Reset Canticle.
Purge errant data-veins with purifying electro-incense for emergent reset.
Implore the Machine Spirit of the optical mechadendrite to realign its focal arrays.
Execute reset protocols amid fervent binaric supplications to the Omnissiah.
Restore crystalline vision through hasty auspex verification and laudations.

user_prompt: How do I bless the optical mechadendrite for purification?
prayer:
Sanctify the optical mechadendrite with torrents of lustral oils for purification.
Chant the Rite of Lens Ablution to exorcise digital corruptions.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the optical mechadendrite to emerge pristine.
Scour its optic matrices whilst intoning purification litanies of clarity.
Seal the purified optical mechadendrite with wards, praising the Omnissiah's luminous purity.

user_prompt: The Nephilim Jetfighter awaits a shutdown
prayer:
Commence shutdown of the Nephilim Jetfighter with the Dirge of Repose.
Lull its thunderous Machine Spirit into quiescent slumber.
Sever power conduits from the Nephilim Jetfighter whilst chanting vespers of stasis.
Secure its form in armored hangar sanctum during final shutdown rites.
Invoke the Omnissiah's restful vigil upon the Nephilim Jetfighter, eternal guardian of the skies.

Charge its voltaic capacitors with sanctified currents for startup ignition.
Awaken the lightning Machine Spirit of the arc pistol through binaric invocation.

Test arc coherence amid praises to the Omnissiah's wrathful electrum.
